title: eucharis hartwegiana
intro: Eucharis hartwegiana, also known as the Amazon lily or False Hoya, is a species of flowering plant native to South America. The medicinal properties of Eucharis hartwegiana include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Eucharis hartwegiana include its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Eucharis hartwegiana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
